live campaign material A Data Collection Coordinator is responsible for gathering, organizing, and maintaining data for various projects or initiatives. Develop and implement data collection plans and strategies
Coordinate with teams to identify data requirements and ensure data quality

Maintain data integrity and ensure data consistency across different systems

Develop and maintain data visualization tools to present data insights to stakeholders
Ensure compliance with data management policies and procedures

Education:
